he8261025g86c3g4bbag8e3cg2118accd59db: I only deal with those what have faith. Clear off.
hd809bf2cg73b0g4beag9f2egee9c9d48a5cb: Still lookin' to get yer head fixed? Best ask the Absolute for help - I can't figure it out.
hcf92a0c9g1028g44b9g8306g21e8109be348: Now, here's somebody special. The Absolute has touched you, hasn't She?
h985a8fe3ge86dg4e3ag83c1gc2890c1acfe9: Priestess Gut needs to touch you too - hold out your arm so I can mark your flesh.
hf93e3d15ge636g4e2fg8e68gd8246b8bfd9c: A priestess. One of the leaders, no doubt about it. Let's make her squeal.
hea4ea02dgbe08g4f93gad07g87b6de4197aa: What's that? Tell your friend to keep quiet, or he'll lose his good eye.
h2b186e4dg9812g40e1g9e9fg32d699c7fad7: Ignore him. Tell me about the mark, priestess.
hbbef41dfg1b94g4cf2gb7b5g52c87f71d101: Ready for the fire, are you?
h8bc5e74agef9eg431fga527g7a430f3d8325: Nod to Wyll and prepare to attack.
h258d8e33gf1d7g42cagb0ecg53e200488719: One of the leaders. Split her skull and be done with it.
hf0f35914gd33fg4f1ag8813gab4627c06eb3: Why should I let you brand me?
h359c9b7bg21eag4324g8c7eg2b975dbf7911: Lets the faithful recognise one another quick-sharp. That way, nobody'll mess with you.
h505c1890gca59g4988g9cb4gd7a8dded63e5: An' it's charged with magic. Ordinary slobs can't see it; only us that follow the Absolute.
h1281523cg901fg4ce6gb592g8ebd00610020: Charged with magic? Perhaps that explains the ease with which these goblins submit to True Souls.
hbdfb7b59g97c2g448aga78ag8ae9493df940: You ready? Brace yourself - this'll sting.
h831cefb1g7d41g4f9egb91agd5389ee8db6f: *As the pain muddles your thoughts, your minds become entangled. A familiar sensation - she too carries a parasite.*
hfb870e48gaa7ag430cgbe65g8ffac9cae55c: *Darkness seems to swallow the temple, leaving you with a vision of the goblin priestess, receiving instruction from a handsome young man. One of the Chosen...*
hd5650bf0g88a5g4f59ga8adga5942c656eba: *The vision dissolves away. You stand before the goblin priestess in the temple once again.*
hd5e9c196g09a8g4a61g81e4g640d0b7b46b5: *Her faith floods into you - a tide of shuddering ecstasy. Her tadpole nestles within that mania, secure... hidden.*
h349c3358g3113g47a4gace8g16b951a3bb2f: I feel you in there, digging around.
ha845b6e2g427cg402fg9094g2ab8262dc5fa: Works both ways. And I saw some weird shadows swimming around in your head just now.
h33b43825g8d29g434aga1a6g12c5b2c486eb: Maybe I can help with that. Us True Souls got to look out for one another.
hd0c41582g69f1g455cgae25g178f5a53f431: Do you think you can fix whatever's causing those shadows?
h369ed79bg1734g4876g804fg6b2268241957: With the Absolute's will, I can fix anythin'.
h871e6a68g3568g4f9ag8ad2g1658ee2d7e25: Let's deal with this in my chapel. It's private. Don't want this lot interfering with True Soul business.
hab92a7ddg1192g4fcfgaf71gaf997e3d1abc: There's a creature inside my head. Can you help with that?
h6865575bg99f6g425ega058g2834cfb66a56: A creature? There's definitely something rotten in there.
hb07152ddgcf77g41c6g992dgdc9110cd3c50: Let me take a closer look. I ain't seen anything like this before.
h67e9a895gd2e9g4465g8317g031f894ba9ad: I'm pretty sure you're infected too.
h90d07fb9ga290g432cgae19g4c68c1f90f9c: Eh? Ain't nothin' wrong with me. You're the one who's sick in the head.
hdcdc3a68ge8bbg43begb81fg2c5c409cba30: You'll never see anything like it again - time to die.
h9115a126gaf19g4bc2gb680gbf8a1017bbfd: Any help would be appreciated. I need a healer.
hd3d95616gac10g4f4dgaf3ag1011eb8406c5: You've come to the right place.
h3bac3724g78d3g497agb9e9g9ef1c905e84f: Can we talk privately? This is a sensitive matter.
had4f5b19gbdb6g443egb20bg9cee2fb34ecc: Of course. Don't want this rabble interfering with True Soul business. Let's go to my chapel.
hafbd97adg090ag41b4gb2a5g9575646b393f: *Your minds brush against one another but are swiftly parted.*
he877bd6dg7b4dg4488gb25eg6bd0ddab5064: Don't wanna get intimate in front of the novices? Fair enough. Got some weird shadows in your head.
h6cd7792bgf21ag4a90g9906g012b885fc105: Already spoke to one of your mates - a True Soul, just like you. Said I'd help them, and that goes for you as well.
hc17fc21egcfb3g48f1g9a33g1856dcf3b3bb: Actually, I'd rather not go through with this.
hbcdcace2gc325g4501ga4cbg78d503514109: I assume this mark has a purpose.
h622633beg07deg4cc0gbb29g239dae86d745: Shows our devotion to the Absolute. These maggots see how strong we are with Her guidance.
hb6369cc1ga852g4e6bga109ga4ba4cba1eec: Whole camp'll be branded soon. An' you should be too.
h4990f00bg8fd8g4cf2g9546g5ba5144e18db: I'm not letting you burn me for life on a whim.
h61dc3ca5g9e3dg4042gace4gacc2f8cf6e5d: Maybe you don't need it. After all, you're special, ain't you? Like me.
hf53ca2b9gd0bag40d1gb085gf1d12e3a541a: *She probes your mind, tangling your thoughts with her's. A familiar sensation - she too carries a parasite.*
h24968fc6g53f9g44aeg98b0ge6b32dd316b9: I'm here to spill your guts across the floor.
h97202dbeg553ag4b9cgb006gace27572e991: You think you can hurt me? This'll be good!
hb9342012g1fbag4b9bg8979g912b865e88d7: That's a bigger fight than we needed to pick - not the subtlest of assassins, are you?
hd6e2d5a6g7b90g4073gba6eg0aecf1b2edf5: We're fighting the whole tribe at once? Subtle. Next time, let me do the talking.
hd37ff148g9294g4726g94afg9c6c880fbf13: | This is a lot of butts to kick all at the same time. |
ha17b5adbgaa52g4830g9007g1864b8339a05: Yes! And I thought you weren't any fun.
h0a7dea4eg9ca1g478cgb0c5gedd4f733d895: | Ah, we're fighting them all at once? Good. Yes. This is fine. |
h6f253647g1bd0g40e6gaee2gb03295e729b4: You want to fight all of them? Time to live up to my legend!
h16075ccdg7815g41f3gb08cgc6ec7847d4c1: Whoa! There are a lot of guts to go around in this place. Are you sure you... Never mind. Too late.
h42915641g8322g4069g8294g28673b5c7210: Good to see you still standing. Ready to figure out what that critter in your head is doing?
h2f9cdfe5g71c8g4967g882ag33717f35e412: Ready to figure out what's goin' on with those shadows in your head?
h9dc7a903g292dg472ag91e1g108e6533fce9: I know what's wrong - there's a creature inside my brain.
h5dff114dg56cag4c21gb2a4g20fadecbc8ad: I've been looking for a healer. Think you can help?
